name: vegehub

metadata.name: vegehub
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 or later (GPLv3+)
metadata.summary: A basic package for simplifying interactions with the Vegetronix VegeHub

documentation:
# Vegetronix VegeHub

This package is intended to simplify interactions with the [Vegetronix VegeHub](https://www.vegetronix.com/Products/VG-HUB-RELAY/). It allows remote setup of the API key and target server address, as well as simplifying retrieval of information about the Hub, including its MAC address.

This package was written for use with the VegeHub integration for [Home Assistant](https://www.home-assistant.io/), but may be used in other projects as well.

Development on this library was done using Python Poetry for dependency management and building/publishing. Find more info about how to use it [here](https://python-poetry.org/docs/basic-usage/).

modules.name: vegehub.helpers
documentation: Helper file containing data transformations.

functions.name: vegehub.helpers.vh400_transform
documentation:
Perform a piecewise linear transformation on the input value.

The transform is based on the following pairs of points:
(0,0), (1.1000, 10.0000), (1.3000, 15.0000), (1.8200, 40.0000),
(2.2000, 50.0000), (3.0000, 100.0000)

functions.name: vegehub.helpers.therm200_transform
documentation: Transform to change voltage into degrees celsius.

modules.name: vegehub
documentation: Package for VegeHub communication.

documentation: VegeHub API access library.

documentation: The number of sensors channels on this hub.

documentation: The number of sensors channels on this hub.

documentation: The number of sensors channels on this hub.

documentation: Request an update of data from the Hub.

documentation: Fetch the current configuration from the device.

methods.name: vegehub.vegehub.VegeHub._request_update
documentation: Ask the device to send in a full update of data to Home Assistant.

methods.name: vegehub.vegehub.VegeHub._get_device_mac
documentation: Fetch the MAC address by sending a POST request to the device's /api/config_get.

methods.name: vegehub.vegehub.VegeHub._get_actuator_info
documentation: Fetch the current status of the actuators.
Vegehub class will contain all properties and methods necessary for contacting the Hub.
